title: hw3_convos: multi-agent workflow session 2026-05-10
content:
## HW3 Session Summary — 2026-05-10

### What was built
Complete specification-driven design package for Virtual Card Lifecycle and Spending Controls. No code — documentation only.

### 6-Phase multi-agent workflow executed
1. **Phase 1 — Foundation (Agent 1 Pass 1):** Narrowed scope, defined 7 OBJs with measurable criteria, subsystem map (SYS-01–05), traceability ID convention, beginning/ending context, task group headings
2. **Phase 2 — Compliance Overlay (Agent 2 Pass 1):** Added 12 COMP assumptions, 12 SEC requirements, 29 AUD events, 21 NFRs, 9 FRAUD edge cases, 10 FAIL modes, data classification matrix
3. **Phase 3 — Deep Specification (Agent 1 Pass 2):** Integrated compliance overlay into full 19-section specification.md with state machines, API contracts, data models, task decomposition
4. **Phase 4 — QA Review (Agent 3 Pass 1):** Found 7 CRITICAL gaps (missing deliverables, broken traceability, field count mismatch), 9 MAJOR gaps, 6 MINOR flags
5. **Phase 5 — Remediation (Agent 1 + Agent 2):** Created agents.md, .cursorrules, README.md; patched all CRITICAL/MAJOR/MINOR issues; added 3 missing API endpoints (Delete Limit, Terminate Card, Deregister Webhook)
6. **Phase 6 — Final Hardening:** 19 cross-file consistency fixes; zero orphan IDs; version finalized to 1.0-FINAL

### Key design decisions
- **Domain choice:** Virtual cards chosen for regulatory richness (PCI-DSS, PSD2, GDPR, AMLD) + natural state machine + multi-actor permissions
- **FROZEN vs SUSPENDED:** Semantic distinction — FROZEN is user/ops reversible; SUSPENDED requires upstream compliance clearance only
- **Pre-auth limit enforcement:** Spending limits evaluated before network call, within 50ms p99 budget
- **Audit atomicity:** State change + audit event in same DB transaction; audit failure rolls back state change (FAIL-04)
- **GDPR vs AMLD:** Pseudonymisation (not deletion) when 7-year retention applies
- **Idempotency:** Original HTTP status code preserved on replay; body hash mismatch returns HTTP 422
- **17-field audit schema:** Including hash chaining for tamper evidence and sequence numbers for gap detection

### Agent 3 QA findings (most impactful)
- Missing deliverables (agents.md, .cursorrules, README.md) — all created in Phase 5
- TASK count mismatches in traceability (OBJ body claims vs actual tasks) — all corrected
- Audit field count 16→17 mismatch — corrected across all files
- Missing API endpoints (DELETE limit, terminate card, deregister webhook) — added as §11.8–11.10
- SUPPORT role not in RBAC registry — added
- NFR-11 idempotency HTTP status ambiguity — clarified
